message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate mod_helper.zig comptime helpers to withInlineBlock

Migrated all remaining comptime helper functions to use withInlineBlock:
- wrap2Blk, wrap3Blk - multi-arg block patterns
- logLevel, b64enc, b64dec - encoding/logging helpers
- stub, hashNew, compareDigest - hash/utility helpers
- checkCond, bufPrint, structField - condition/format helpers
- listContains, unwrapOptional, tryOrDefault - advanced patterns
- allocPrint, conditional - allocation/conditional helpers

Fixed format string issues by using emit() chains instead of emitFmt
with comptime string concatenation (which breaks when strings contain braces).

Reduces emitInlineBlockStart occurrences from 81 to 60.
